title: Automation for creating multiple subitems or connected items for each assignee
excerpt:
For example we have an item with multiple assignee. 
Is there a way to make an automation which will create and connect item for each assignee

posts.author: EvgenDen (EvgenDen)
posts.cookedHtml:
For example we have an item with multiple assignee.
Is there a way to make an automation which will create and connect item for each assignee

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @EvgenDen,

When you say connected items for each assignee, can you elaborate on this for me?

Based on my understanding, is this along the lines of what you’re looking for?

Screen Shot 2024-04-08 at 2.30.37 pm1508×634 38.5 KB

Looking forward to hearing more

posts.author: EvgenDen (EvgenDen)
posts.cookedHtml:
“When you say connected items for each assignee, can you elaborate on this for me?”
I’ve got one item with multiple assignees.
I need to create

  • connected items in another board
    or
  • subitems
    for each assignee automatically

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
@EvgenDen hey! Not sure I fully understand what you’re trying to achieve.
Would you mind elaborating or provide an example?
